properties.name: file.storage.access-url
properties.description: Assets URL for file retrival from storage

properties.name: file.storage.base-path
properties.description: Base path for file storage in local development

properties.name: file.storage.base-url
properties.description: Access url for accessing the files stored in storage by the frontend

properties.name: file.storage.max-file-size
properties.description: Limit for file size that can be uploaded to storage

properties.name: file.storage.max-request-size
properties.description: Limit for maximum request size that can be sent to storage

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT Secret key used for signig and verifying JWT tokes

properties.name: file.storage.type
properties.description: Type of file storage to be used, can be either local or s3

properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (e.g. http://localhost:3000)

properties.name: cors.allowed-methods
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP methods for CORS

properties.name: cors.allowed-headers
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed request headers for CORS

properties.name: cors.max-age
properties.description: CORS preflight response cache duration in seconds

properties.name: reservation.expiry.check-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between reservation expiry checks (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)
